title: ajax reflexa
intro: Ajax reflexa, also known as Ageratum conyzoides, is a flowering plant native to tropical and subtropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of wounds and skin infections. In herbal preparations, Ajax reflexa can be consumed as a decoction or infusion, or applied topically as a poultice or salve, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
